case_title: PORTELLO, KEITH vs. JOHNSON, LARRY IND AND AS PARTNERS DBA et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-94-102036 WITH CASE CGC-94-102037, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION HEARING SET FOR APR-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06 HEARING SET FOR APR-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
